recommended_overlap_notes: IBDMDB/iHMP/HMP2 longitudinal multi-omics parent row. Count once at cohort level only; do not count modality accessions, portal records, dbGaP, GEO, BioProject/SRA, or IBDMDB portal components as separate cohorts. Public sources describe 132 subjects followed for one year with 2,965 stool, biopsy, and blood specimens and multiple assay layers. GEO GSE111889 is the host transcriptomics component; dbGaP phs001626.v1.p1 and BioProject PRJNA398089 describe the broader IBDMDB/HMP2 resource.
uncertainty: BioProject relationships are multi-level: GEO GSE111889 links to PRJNA438663, while the registry row uses PRJNA398089 for the broader IBDMDB/HMP2 project. Treat both as DS001-family accessions unless a future row explicitly represents a distinct downstream analysis.
